title: Eevee Cosmetics [Cobblemon]
description: Cosmetic Items for Eevee in Cobblemon!
body:
So far adds 10 new cosmetic options for Eevee. To get these cosmetics, simply give the Eevee the dye of the specific outfit you want (listed below), and there ya go! The Eevee cannot evolve after this, but its bst is increased to slightly higher than that of the Eeveelutions to make up for it, although the moveset stays the same.

![Eevee but Green](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f128fb660c2194333be7801b5e8cdfa26393a6c4.png)

![All the new V1.1 Eevees](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/53e4a0bbc712ac5dddb8ed4a3c57518cf5563f67.png)

Lime Dye = Leaf Eevee

Blue Dye = Blue-bowed Eevee

Red Dye = Red-hatted Eevee

Light Gray Dye = Mimikyu Eevee

Cyan Dye = Cyan-outfit Eevee

Yellow Dye = Pikachu Eevee

Pink Dye = Clefairy (or an attempt at Clefairy) Eevee

Green Dye = Rayquaza Eevee

The other two Eevees require different items to evolve, but I can assure you, those ones will probably be worth it.

Credits:

**Cobblemon Team**: The mod (duh), The Eevee model and animations, the Mimikyu texture, and the help they gave on the discord

**@TheSpetacularSix on Youtube**: Blue-bowed Eevee was based on their in-game Eevee

**Me**: All the accessory models (hats, bows, hoods, etc...), texturing for most of those (besides the Mimikyu hood), figuring out how to actually get them in lol-

And you, for supporting it thus far. This is not the end of this pack. In fact, it might just be the beginning.
